note: SPEEDUP is the scale claim (brute cosine+argsort O(N) vs faiss HNSW sublinear query); it is ~data-agnostic and reproducible. recall_in_pool here is on SYNTHETIC clustered data = a sanity signal ONLY (synthetic geometry is not a faithful proxy for real-corpus recall); real-corpus behaviour-preservation (same top-k on e5) is proven in tests/test_ann_recall_equivalence.py. Pure numpy+faiss, seeded, OOM-safe.
